advancements.end.dragon_fireworks.title: To Infinity, And Beyond
advancements.end.dragon_fireworks.descri: Use a Dragon Firework Rocket while flying with an Elytra
gamerule.jabsfixedtransport.ice_melt_in_: This is to limit Ice Boat highways, note ice will not melt next ot crying obsidian regardless
gamerule.jabsfixedtransport.elytra_drag: Elytra flies faster near blocks, slower in open spaces
Increased drag in open spaces, decreased drag near blocks
gamerule.jabsfixedtransport.elytra_fly_i: Allow Elytras to fly in rain
0 - Elytra cancels, 1 - Elytra works but no fireworks, 2 - Elytra works
gamerule.jabsfixedtransport.elytra_deplo: Free fall time before Elytra can be deployed
Non 0 numbers - Holding Space will automatically deploy Elytra
gamerule.jabsfixedtransport.elytra_hit_c: Ticks the elytra no longer works when hit
